$description: Artifacts-only extension tokens: the 'memory domain' violet accent (art-violet-*) plus the workspace browse-shell constants (art-panel-*, art-browser-band-height). The violet source is artifacts/static/css/gallery.css lines 34-38 (dark) and 161-164 (light) — a decorative brand accent (not body text), so the high-contrast family opts out via $extensions.inherits rather than duplicating an identical group: these saturated violet values already read at equal-or-better contrast against high-contrast's more extreme (near-black/near-white) backgrounds than they do against dark/light's own. The art-panel-*/art-browser-band-height group is the stacked two-card browse shell (a compact browser band above a dominant detail card): theme-independent layout constants (identical in both groups, mirroring web_terminal.json's wt-header-height pattern) so the high-contrast/apex families inherit them unchanged too.

art-panel-radius.$description: Grafana-style card corner radius for the browse-view cards and their in-card chrome (frame 2a). Theme-independent layout constant.

art-panel-gap.$description: Canvas gutter around and between the stacked browser band + detail cards (padding:8px;gap:8px workspace region). Theme-independent.

art-browser-band-height.$description: Height of the scrollable artifact-list strip in the browse-view browser band (the #sidebar-body list). Bounded so the detail card below stays dominant; the list scrolls within it. Theme-independent.

art-panel-radius.$description: Theme-independent layout constant — identical to dark's value.

art-panel-gap.$description: Theme-independent layout constant — identical to dark's value.

art-browser-band-height.$description: Theme-independent layout constant — identical to dark's value.
